title: cojoba micrantha
intro: Cojoba micrantha, also known as the Dwarf Cojoba or Monkey Ear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, as well as its ability to treat various health issues such as fever and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cojoba micrantha include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cojoba micrantha can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
